rows.description: Merton Cur. ad Festa Annunc. et Micha
rows.notes: Values were in consensus (the '30-' implying 30 pounds zero shillings and pence). Description 'Merton Cur. ad Festa Annunc. et Micha' from gemini-flash was chosen over 'Merton cur. ad Fetta Annua et Milly' from gpt-5-mini after visual verification. The 'C' in Cur. appears capitalized, 'Festa Annunc. et Micha' is a more accurate transcription of the abbreviations.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Payments to the curate of Merton for the feasts of the Annunciation and Michaelmas, amounting to £30 0s 0d.
